name: Easy Oven Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease or spray a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
3. Chop the bread until fine crumbs form (about 1 cup).
4. Grate the onion for 1 tablespoon.
5. In a large bowl, mix the bread crumbs and grated onion with ground turkey, spinach, salt, pepper, and egg.
6. Shape the turkey mixture into 16 meatballs.
7. Place the meatballs in the pan and bake for 25 minutes or until the meatballs are lightly browned and cooked through.
8. Meanwhile, thinly slice the carrots and cut mushrooms into half-inch pieces.
9. In a 3-quart saucepan over high heat, heat the carrots, mushrooms, pasta sauce, and 1/2 cup water to boiling.
10. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 20 minutes.
11. When the meatballs are done, add them to the sauce; cover and simmer for 10 minutes longer to blend flavors and cook vegetables until tender.
12. Serve over spaghetti or rice.
Yield: 4 main-dish servings
Nutritional information per serving (without spaghetti or rice): Calories 435, Fat 20g, Cholesterol 112mg, Sodium 1595mg.
